_comment: Copy this file to .mcp.json in your project root. Fill in all YOUR_xxx_HERE values before use.
_docs: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server config. Each key is a named server. Claude Code loads these at startup.
_discord_note: Discord is the FREE default notification layer. No MCP server needed — use scripts/discord-post.cjs instead. See docs/DISCORD_SETUP.md for setup.
_slack_note: Slack MCP is OPTIONAL. Requires paid Slack subscription (~$8.75/user/month). Remove this if using Discord only.

slack._comment: Slack MCP — OPTIONAL. Requires paid Slack subscription (~$8.75/user/month). Remove this block if using Discord instead (recommended).

env._hint_bot_token: xoxb-... — get from api.slack.com > Your Apps > OAuth & Permissions
env._hint_webhook: https://hooks.slack.com/services/... — get from api.slack.com > Incoming Webhooks

jira._comment: Jira MCP — enables Claude Code to create, read, and update Jira tickets

env._hint_cloud_id: Found in your Atlassian URL: https://YOUR_CLOUD_ID.atlassian.net
env._hint_email: The email address you use to log in to Atlassian

notion._comment: Notion MCP — enables Claude Code to read and write Notion databases and pages

env._hint_api_key: Create an integration at notion.so/my-integrations. Share your workspace pages with the integration.

telegram._comment: Telegram MCP — enables Claude Code to send notifications to a Telegram chat or group

env._hint_bot_token: Create a bot at t.me/BotFather. The token format is 123456789:ABCdef...
env._hint_chat_id: Your personal chat ID or group chat ID. Use @userinfobot to find your user ID.
env._hint_chat_id_group: For group chats, add the bot to the group. Chat ID will be a negative number, e.g. -1001234567890

_setup_steps: 1. Copy this file to .mcp.json in your project root
2. Remove all keys starting with underscore (_comment, _hint, etc.) — they are documentation only
3. Replace every YOUR_xxx_HERE value with your real credentials
5. Run: claude mcp list — to verify servers are loaded
6. Restart Claude Code — MCP servers load at startup
